name: Cave Bridge — South End
description: The bridge ends at a small landing. To the west, a corridor leads deeper into the cave. To the east, the path is blocked by a collapse of rock and rubble.
ambient: The torchlight here casts long, wavering shadows.
A faint clatter of bones echoes from the west.

interaction_rules.text: You close your eyes and murmur a quiet prayer. For a heartbeat, the room feels still enough to listen.
Your voice drifts through the area and fades into the distance. No one applauds, but it lifts your spirits.
